title: FDIC studying plan to include smaller U.S. banks in Basel III capital requirements after failures in early 2023
text: The chairman of the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. said Thursday that U.S. regulators are considering a plan to include banks with assets as low as $100 billion in the international regime for capital requirements known as Basel III.

title: Northern Trust Corporation to Webcast Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Corporation announced today that it will webcast its second quarter 2023 earnings conference call live on Wednesday, July 19, 2023. The webcast, the earnings press release, and related presentation materials will be accessible on Northern Trust's website. The call will be conducted at 9:00 a.m. (CT), following the release that morning of Northern Trust's second quarter 2023 earnings press release. A replay of the webcast will be available for approximate.

title: Northern Trust (NTRS) Rolls Out A-Suite for Asset Owners
text: Northern Trust's (NTRS) A-Suite will offer content, research and peer networking opportunities to asset owners and allocators.

title: Revenue Growth Aids Northern Trust (NTRS) Amid High Costs
text: Rising non-interest income, NII and growth in loan balances are likely to aid Northern Trust's (NTRS) revenues. However, high costs, volatile markets and deteriorating credit quality are concerning.

title: Brightwell Reappoints Northern Trust for Investment Operations Outsourcing Services
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) today announces it has been reappointed by United Kingdom (UK) defined benefit (DB) pension scheme manager Brightwell as its provider of investment operations outsourcing services. Brightwell, formerly known as BT Pension Scheme Management, is the primary service provider to the BT Pension Scheme (BTPS). This is a DB pension scheme for employees, former employees and dependents of BT Group plc and some of its associated companies. BTPS is o.
